text.title: Trunk-Based Feature Flags Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end example: a dark-launch release flag for the Go shadow router that ramps over four stages and is cleaned up after sign-off.

section.title: Context
section.p: Task: F-066-shadow-router migrates `/api/v2/quote` from Python to Go. Author wraps the router behind flag `quote_shadow_go_pct`, type=release, dark_launch=true.

section.title: Spec at creation
section.code: { "artefact_id": "ff-f066-shadow-router", "flag_id": "quote_shadow_go_pct", "owner_email": "ruslan@faion.net", "type": "release", "ramp_plan": [ {"pct": 1, "gate": "diff_rate < 0.5 over 24h"}, {"pct": 10, "gate": "diff_rate < 0.5 AND error_rate at baseline"}, {"pct": 50, "gate": "all clusters classified, sample >= 10000"}, {"pct": 100, "gate": "sign-off recorded"} ], "kill_switch_tested": true, "cleanup_ticket_id": "TICKET-4421", "cleanup_sla_date": "2026-07-23", "dark_launch": true, "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }

section.title: Stage promotion log (excerpt)
section.code: 2026-05-23 promote 0 → 1% gate green (diff_rate 0.08, 1247 samples) 2026-05-25 promote 1 → 10% gate green (diff_rate 0.12, error_rate +0.0) 2026-05-27 freeze at 50% diff_rate 0.71 — fx-rounding cluster open 2026-05-30 resume 50% fix shipped (rounding-mode set to half-up) 2026-06-02 promote → 100% sign-off ruslan@faion.net 2026-07-23 cleanup flag removed, ticket TICKET-4421 closed
